uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

role.description: The user's role in the platform.

twoFactorEnabled.description: Whether 2FA is enabled for this user.

DataEntry.title: Data Entry
DataEntry.description: A secure data entry stored by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the data entry.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this data.

title.description: The title of the data entry.

content.description: The encrypted or secure content of the data entry.

sharedWith.description: List of user UIDs this data is shared with.

permissions.description: Map of user UIDs to their specific access level (read or write).

FileEntry.title: File Entry
FileEntry.description: A secure, encrypted file stored by a user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the file entry.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this file.

fileName.description: The original name of the file.

fileType.description: The MIME type of the file.

encryptedData.description: The base64 encoded, AES encrypted file data.

sharedWith.description: List of user UIDs this file is shared with.

permissions.description: Map of user UIDs to their specific access level (read or write).

BreachLog.title: Breach Log
BreachLog.description: A log of a potential or actual data breach event.

id.description: The unique identifier for the log entry.

type.description: The type of breach event (e.g., 'Unauthorized Access Attempt').

severity.description: The severity level of the event.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: A notification for a user about a platform event.

id.description: The unique identifier for the notification.

userId.description: The UID of the user who receives this notification.

message.description: The message content of the notification.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.
